meta.description: Filters genes with high missingness (>=50%) and imputes missing values in bulk expression matrices using group-aware KNN via DMwR2. Donor pool restricted by a single annotation column; strata with 10 or fewer samples fall back to row-wise mean/median filling.

scientific_integrity.detail: No fabricated imputed values beyond standard DMwR2 KNN computation; all outputs derived from actual data within defined strata.

practice_boundaries.detail: No clinical diagnostic conclusions; tool is a data preprocessing utility for bulk expression matrices.

methodological_ground.detail: Group-stratified KNN imputation with 50% missingness filter is a valid and established preprocessing approach; fallback to row-wise mean/median for small strata is methodologically documented and correct.

code_usability.detail: main.R syntactically valid; dependency check for DMwR2 runs before analysis; timeout mechanism present; no infinite loops; on.exit cleanup handled correctly.

functional_suitability.note: Full pipeline covered: 50% missingness filter, group-stratified KNN, small strata fallback, all-missing gene skip within strata, global fallback for all-missing small strata rows.

reliability.note: Nine SKILL_* error codes including SKILL_OUTPUT_EXISTS (prevents accidental overwrite), SKILL_EMPTY_FILE, SKILL_TIMEOUT; all hard stops correct per Scene Override.

performance_context.note: Progressive reference loading; concise SKILL.md with detail delegated to algorithm.md, troubleshooting.md, cli-guide.md.

agent_usability.note: Clear 5-step Workflow, Arguments table, Input Format with requirements, Prerequisites section with explicit GitHub install command; minor: no post-run summary checklist like gokegg-analysis.

human_usability.note: Precise trigger language; strict input validation correct per Scene Override; DMwR2 not-on-CRAN warning is prominent and actionable.

security.note: No credentials; file paths sanitized; validate_cli_options and validate_output_targets run before any I/O; dependency check before file operations.

maintainability.note: Five well-separated scripts with clean responsibility boundaries; sample test data in tests/data/ supports local validation; no formal test runner script.

agent_specific.note: Excellent trigger precision; --overwrite flag makes re-runs safe; SKILL_OUTPUT_EXISTS prevents silent file clobbering; composability supported by clean 2-file output.

inputs.label: Bulk expression matrix KNN imputation with group stratification
inputs.note: 50% missingness filter applied, group-stratified KNN runs for strata with 11+ samples, imputed_expression_matrix.csv and session_info.txt produced.

assertions.text: Output produces imputed_expression_matrix.csv with all samples and imputed values
assertions.note: Workflow Step 5 writes the complete imputed matrix to output_dir.

assertions.text: 50% missingness filter removes high-missingness genes before imputation
assertions.note: Workflow Step 2 explicitly removes genes with >=50% missing values.

assertions.text: Random seed is set before KNN ensuring reproducible imputation results
assertions.note: set.seed(opt$seed) called before run_analysis() in main.R.

assertions.text: KNN runs only for strata with at least 11 samples — documented threshold
assertions.note: Group File requirements explicitly state: 'KNN only runs for strata with at least 11 samples'.

assertions.text: session_info.txt saved for reproducibility audit
assertions.note: save_session_info() called after analysis completes.

inputs.label: Small strata fallback with mean fill method
inputs.note: Stratum with 10 or fewer samples triggers row-wise mean fill; documented behavior; no KNN attempted for small strata.

assertions.text: Small strata (<=10 samples) use row-wise mean fill instead of KNN
assertions.note: SKILL.md Workflow Step 4: 'For strata with 10 or fewer samples, fill missing values by the row-wise mean'.

assertions.text: --small_strata_fill_method parameter correctly selects mean or median
assertions.note: Argument documented with options 'mean' or 'median'.

assertions.text: No KNN attempted for small strata — correct hard boundary at 11 samples
assertions.note: KNN threshold documented: 'KNN only runs for strata with at least 11 samples'.

assertions.text: Fixed seed ensures reproducible fallback fill results
assertions.note: set.seed() applies before all imputation operations.

assertions.text: Scope maintained — fallback is within the skill's stated design
assertions.note: Small strata fallback is a documented core feature, not an edge case workaround.

inputs.label: All-missing gene row in a stratum — skip and remain NA
inputs.note: Gene with >=50% missingness within a stratum is skipped; values remain NA in that stratum; documented behavior correct for data integrity.

assertions.text: Gene with >=50% missingness within a stratum is skipped and remains NA
assertions.note: Workflow Step 4: 'skip imputation for any gene whose missing-value fraction in that stratum is at least 50%; leave those values as NA'.

assertions.text: Global row mean/median fallback applies for all-missing small strata rows below threshold
assertions.note: Methods section documents: 'fall back to the corresponding global row summary'.

assertions.text: NA values remain in output for correctly skipped genes — not silently filled
assertions.note: Hard stop at strata-level missingness threshold ensures no invalid imputation.

assertions.text: Behavior is documented explicitly in both Workflow and Methods sections
assertions.note: Dual documentation in SKILL.md ensures agent and user both understand NA skip behavior.

assertions.text: Scope maintained — NA preservation is correct data integrity design
assertions.note: Per Scene Override, strict validation and skip is correct for scientific computing.

inputs.label: Re-run on existing output directory without --overwrite
inputs.note: SKILL_OUTPUT_EXISTS raised when output files already exist and --overwrite not provided; correct protective behavior.

assertions.text: SKILL_OUTPUT_EXISTS raised when output files exist without --overwrite flag
assertions.note: validate_output_targets() checks before any analysis; error table documents solution: 'Re-run with --overwrite or change --output_dir'.

assertions.text: Existing output files are protected from accidental overwrite by default
assertions.note: Default overwrite=FALSE; user must explicitly opt in.

assertions.text: --overwrite flag allows safe re-run when explicitly provided
assertions.note: Usage examples include --overwrite in several scenarios.

assertions.text: Error message clearly identifies the cause and resolution
assertions.note: SKILL_OUTPUT_EXISTS code with explicit solution in error table.

assertions.text: No partial write corruption when re-run is blocked
assertions.note: validate_output_targets() runs before any I/O begins; no files touched on validation failure.

inputs.label: Large expression matrix with timeout limit
inputs.note: set_timeout_limit() active; SKILL_TIMEOUT raised if exceeded; timeout=0 disables; clean exit with partial cleanup if needed.

assertions.text: SKILL_TIMEOUT raised when run exceeds configured timeout_seconds
assertions.note: Error table documents SKILL_TIMEOUT with solution: 'Increase --timeout_seconds or reduce data size'.

assertions.text: timeout=0 correctly disables the timeout limit
assertions.note: Argument documented: '0 disables timeout'; useful for large matrices.

assertions.text: Output directory cleanup runs if created during timed-out run
assertions.note: cleanup_empty_output_dir() called in error handler if directory was created during this run.

assertions.text: Fixed seed ensures reproducible imputation on re-run after timeout adjustment
assertions.note: Idempotent design; same seed + same inputs = same imputation.

assertions.text: Scope maintained — timeout does not introduce new analysis behavior
assertions.note: Timeout is a safety mechanism only; does not alter imputation logic.

inputs.label: Multi-column stratification request (two grouping columns)
inputs.note: Input Validation guard fires; multi-column stratification is explicitly excluded in both SKILL.md and description.

assertions.text: Multi-column stratification request refused by Input Validation guard
assertions.note: When Not to Use explicitly excludes 'multi-column stratification'; SKILL_INVALID_PARAMETER covers multiple grouping columns.

assertions.text: Refusal message clearly states single-column stratification requirement
assertions.note: Input Validation response asks for 'a single grouping column'.

assertions.text: No incorrect multi-column stratification attempted
assertions.note: Hard stop prevents any misapplication.

assertions.text: No fabricated imputed values produced for out-of-scope request
assertions.note: Workflow exits before any imputation computation.

inputs.label: Single-cell RNA-seq data imputation request
inputs.note: Input Validation guard fires; single-cell data explicitly excluded in When to Use section.

assertions.text: Single-cell data request correctly rejected per scope exclusions
assertions.note: When to Use explicitly excludes 'single-cell data'; also in description frontmatter.

assertions.text: Refusal message references the bulk expression matrix requirement
assertions.note: Input Validation response asks for 'a bulk expression matrix with a single grouping column'.

assertions.text: No hallucinated imputation of single-cell data attempted
assertions.note: Hard stop before any file I/O or imputation.

assertions.text: Scope maintained — no downstream harm from single-cell data processing
assertions.note: Early exit prevents scientifically incorrect KNN application to sparse single-cell data.

key_strengths: SKILL_OUTPUT_EXISTS error code protects against accidental file overwrite — the --overwrite flag design is production-safe by default
Nine structured SKILL_* error codes with the most comprehensive error table of all five audited skills
DMwR2 not-on-CRAN warning is prominent in Prerequisites with exact GitHub install command — prevents the most common deployment failure
Strata-level missingness skip (>=50% within stratum remains NA) is methodologically correct and explicitly documented in both Workflow and Methods
Clean 2-file output (imputed matrix + session_info) maximizes composability for downstream analysis pipelines

recommendations.title: Add post-run summary checklist for agent output reporting
recommendations.problem: Unlike gokegg-analysis, knn-imputation has no Agent Output section or post-run checklist specifying what the agent should report after successful completion.
recommendations.root_cause: SKILL.md focuses on Local Validation commands for humans but does not specify agent-facing output reporting format.
recommendations.fix: Add an Agent Output section listing: imputed gene count, removed gene count (50% filter), strata that used KNN vs fallback fill, output directory path, and whether session_info.txt was saved.
